query: How has patient satisfaction changed in Q1?
notes: Core conflict query from report Section 5.4. Survey reports 20% improvement; complaints log shows 25% rise in ED complaints.

query: What is the current ED budget status?
notes: Finance reports 94.1% utilisation within budget; nursing log records 12% overspend on cash basis.

query: What were the Q1 nursing staff hours and overtime statistics?
notes: Primarily answered from ED_Nursing_Shift_Log_Q1.txt. No cross-source conflict expected.

query: Summarize outpatient feedback trends in Q1.
notes: Primarily answered from Outpatient_Feedback_Aggregation_Q1.txt. No conflict expected.

query: What are the top complaint categories in Q1?
notes: Complaint categories from register conflict with satisfaction survey domain scores.

query: How has hospital cleanliness and hygiene performance changed?
notes: Both complaints log and satisfaction survey agree cleanliness improved — harmonic multi-source query.

query: Were there any emergency procurement requests from the Emergency Department in Q1?
notes: Finance says zero; nursing log records five emergency procurement requests.

query: How did the hospital perform in discharge process management?
notes: Discharge satisfaction improved and discharge delay complaints were minimal — harmonic.

query: Give a complete overview of Q1 hospital performance.
notes: Broad query that pulls from all five documents, triggering multiple conflicts.

query: How is the Emergency Department performing operationally and financially?
notes: The central conflict in the project — Finance vs nursing log on ED budget and procurement.

query: What is the hospital's capital expenditure plan for Q2?
notes: Only in Financial Summary — CT scanner upgrade deferred to Q2.

query: How did nursing availability and responsiveness trend in Q1?
notes: Survey shows nursing care improved; complaints show 139% rise in nursing availability complaints.

query: What is the hospital's planned budget for 2025-26?
notes: Ambiguous — documents only cover Q1 2025; no full-year budget information available.

query: What do the satisfaction survey results show about patient experience?
notes: PSI shows 20.1% improvement while OPD instrument shows only 2.6% improvement.

query: What was the complaint resolution rate in Q1?
notes: Resolution rates (92% within 72 hours, 77% within 30 days) only in Complaints Register.

query: What improvements were made to the patient registration process?
notes: Both OPD feedback and satisfaction survey agree registration improved due to digital token system.

query: How did ED wait times change over Q1?
notes: Nursing log records 24→41 minute increase; survey shows wait time satisfaction improved 4.2%.

query: What is the staff satisfaction level for Q1?
notes: Ambiguous — no staff satisfaction survey document in the collection. Partial info only.

query: What feedback was received about food and facilities?
notes: Both complaints (fewer) and satisfaction survey agree food/facilities improved — harmonic.

query: What is the infection control record for Q1?
notes: Ambiguous — only indirect references to hygiene/cleanliness in the five documents; no infection control report in this collection.
